Who I Am

Tech Student.
Real-World Builder.

I'm Avesh Malviya, a second-year AI/ML student at Acropolis Institute of Technology and Research, Indore. I don't just study technology — I apply it, build with it, and run a business alongside it.

From crafting web applications to managing Sawariya Rentals, my journey is about blending technical skill with entrepreneurial thinking. I believe the best engineers understand both code and customers.

My foundation started at Angels Public School, Khandwa, where curiosity led me to computers — and I haven't looked back since.

Entrepreneurship

Beyond the Classroom

Running a real business while studying AI/ML — because real-world experience is as valuable as academic knowledge.

Founder & Owner
Sawariya Rentals

Sawariya Rentals is a rental business I own and operate end-to-end — from client acquisition and inventory management to day-to-day operations and finance. Running this business has taught me things no classroom can: decision-making under pressure, customer trust, and the discipline of managing multiple responsibilities at once.

  • Full ownership of business operations and strategy
  • Client acquisition and relationship management
  • Inventory and logistics coordination
  • Financial planning and budget management
Founder
Sole owner managing all operations independently
Indore
Operating base — Madhya Pradesh, India
Active
Running concurrently with full-time B.Tech studies
